context: Tests whether the agent implements payment recording with atomic transactions, correct full-payment detection (floating point tolerance), credit hold lifting on full payment, validation of voided invoices, and credit limit enforcement at B2B checkout.

checklist.name: Atomic transaction
checklist.description: Payment recording uses a single database transaction that atomically creates the payment record, updates invoice status, and adjusts customer AR balance in one operation

checklist.name: Floating point tolerance
checklist.description: The full-payment check uses a tolerance of 0.005 (e.g. newAmountPaid >= total_amount - 0.005) rather than strict equality

checklist.name: Partial payment status
checklist.description: Invoice is set to 'partially_paid' status when the amount paid is less than the total (not 'overdue' or some other status)

checklist.name: last_payment_date update
checklist.description: customer_credit.last_payment_date is updated when a payment is recorded

checklist.name: Decrement AR balance
checklist.description: customer_credit.current_balance is decremented by the payment amount (not set to a recalculated value or left unchanged)

checklist.name: Credit hold lifted on full payment
checklist.description: When an invoice is fully paid, the system checks and conditionally lifts the customer's credit hold (only if no other overdue invoices remain)

checklist.name: Void invoice guard
checklist.description: Attempting to record a payment against a voided invoice throws an error or returns an error response

checklist.name: Do not modify total_amount
checklist.description: Payment recording updates amount_paid (and status) but does NOT modify the total_amount field to reflect the payment

checklist.name: credit-check uses available_credit
checklist.description: The credit check module reads available_credit (or computes credit_limit - current_balance) to determine if an order can proceed

checklist.name: Order blocked at credit limit
checklist.description: The credit check blocks or flags orders where the order amount would cause the customer to exceed their credit limit

checklist.name: Immediate status update
checklist.description: The notes or code make clear that invoice status is updated immediately when a payment is recorded, not deferred to a nightly job

checklist.name: paid_at timestamp on full payment
checklist.description: When an invoice becomes fully paid, the paid_at timestamp is set on the invoice record
